steps.title: [vegetarian tacos] Results from Allrecipes
steps.vlm_low_detail_summary: TAGS: page_type=search_results; modal=no; error_banner=no; focus=center | recipe cards for vegetarian tacos, pagination buttons, Allrecipes branding

evidence.claim: The trajectory contains only one step and ends immediately on an Allrecipes search results page for vegetarian tacos, not on a recipe page or answer page that would provide ingredients and preparation instructions.
The single observed action is `send message to user: '[EXIT]'`, which indicates the agent terminated rather than continuing the search or extracting the requested recipe details.

The screenshot metadata shows a search results page titled `[vegetarian tacos] Results from Allrecipes` at `https://www.allrecipes.com/search?q=vegetarian+tacos&offset=96`, with no visible recipe details in the available observation.
No hard constraint is satisfied or verified in the available evidence because the required ingredients and brief preparation method are not visible or checked anywhere in the run.

args.expected_behavior: The agent should have continued from the search results page to open a relevant vegetarian tacos recipe and extract the ingredients plus a brief description of the preparation method.
args.actual_behavior: The agent exited immediately on the search results page without reaching any recipe content or answering the question.
args.regression_rule: Do not terminate on a search results page when the task requires extracting recipe content; continue until a recipe page is opened and the requested ingredients and method are verified.
